words.definition: Drug reducing immune system activity

words.definition: Very small in amount
words.exampleSentence: The damage was minimal.

words.exampleSentence: Neuroplasticity enables recovery after brain injury.

words.definition: To provide a reason to act
words.exampleSentence: Teachers motivate students.

words.definition: Originating in a hospital setting
words.exampleSentence: Nosocomial infections affect many hospitalized patients annually.

words.definition: To care for and encourage growth
words.exampleSentence: Parents nurture their children.

words.definition: Food product providing health benefits beyond nutrition
words.exampleSentence: Nutraceuticals like probiotics support digestive health.

words.definition: The beginning or start

words.exampleSentence: Ophthalmology treats conditions from cataracts to glaucoma.

words.definition: To be greater than
words.exampleSentence: The benefits outweigh the risks.
